location.address: Markou Mpotsari & Leoforos Konstantinou Karamanli, Thessaloniki 546 44, Greece

about.summary: Student accommodation Mpotsari: cozy private studio in Eastern Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed studio is ideal for students and digital nomads seeking a central base.

sections.title: 🏠 Student Accommodation Mpotsari – Studio Thessaloniki
sections.content: Student accommodation Mpotsari — this cozy, fully furnished studio is designed for one tenant and features a double bed, private balcony, and a comfortable layout that avoids the hassle of shared rooms.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed for single occupancy.
Ideal for students: Quiet study desk and central transport access.
Fully equipped: Balcony access, private kitchenware, washing machine, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location in Eastern Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in Eastern Thessaloniki near Mpotsari offers local convenience. Daily essentials like supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are all within 50 meters, and public transport is right around the corner.
highlights: Easy commute: Bus stop nearby provides direct lines to Aristotle University and City College.
Neighbourhood perks: Quiet residential streets with local shops and cafes nearby.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This studio Thessaloniki Mpotsari is a great Erasmus housing option for students and remote digital nomads. For university information, visit the official pages of Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our Mpotsari Erasmus studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Smoking permitted outside only, not inside the apartment. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Not suitable for couples. Playing musical instruments not allowed. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_description: Student accommodation Mpotsari: cozy 1-bed studio in Eastern Thessaloniki. Perfect for Erasmus students & digital nomads in Thessaloniki.
